title: cyclosorus cuneatus
intro: Cyclosorus cuneatus, also known as the Wedge-Leafed or Cuneate Cinnamon Fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, native to Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Cyclosorus cuneatus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Cyclosorus cuneatus is commonly prepared as a tea or infuser for its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
